positive: A whimsical, highly stylized forest creature illustration, resembling a fox mixed with a nocturnal owl, sitting among oversized bioluminescent mushrooms and trailing vines. The creature has warm orange fur and glowing cyan feather accents. The scene is rendered in a clean, vector-art inspired style with crisp outlines and solid color blocks, evoking vintage nature etchings combined with modern minimal aesthetics. Emphasis on strong silhouettes and high contrast between the luminous flora and the deep, midnight blue background. Centered composition, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Flat graphic design, clean edges, detailed yet simplified.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, grainy, noisy, text, signature, watermark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, fuzzy, realistic photo, photorealism, messy background
